title: fraxinus schiedeana
intro: Fraxinus schiedeana, also known as the Ash tree, is a species of flowering plant in the olive family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fraxinus schiedeana include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Fraxinus schiedeana is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, although it can also be found in herbal supplements and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
